productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Fenil Bright Green Kidswear
description: CompositionBright green shorts made of 100% cotton, with green polka dot fabric around the waistline and leg hems, two conceal pockets on the front sides, two conceal pockets on the back, satin ribbon belt around waist, blouson effect on leg hems with push button closures on the attached beltFittingRegular Waist - 22 - 24 inches Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get ready to indulge your little girl in the spirit of spring with these bright green shorts from gini and jony. Team this with white tees and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the soft fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
